description:
## Goal

Build the generic HTML downloader using BeautifulSoup for single-page text extraction. This is the fallback downloader for simple HTML sources.

## Responsibilities

- Fetch single HTML page
- Extract main content (strip navigation, scripts, styles, ads)
- Normalize to UTF-8 plaintext
- Handle mojibake/encoding issues

## Output

- raw/{tradition}/{text_id}.txt — clean plaintext
- raw/{tradition}/{text_id}.meta.toml — provenance metadata

## Meta.toml Fields

source_url, downloaded_at, content_sha256, format, extractor, license, translator

## Implementation Details

- Use BeautifulSoup for HTML parsing
- Extract text from main content containers (div, article, main)
- Strip script, style, nav, footer, header elements
- Normalize whitespace and line endings
- Calculate SHA256 of content for idempotency

## See Also

docs/guru-implementation.md Stage 1: Corpus Acquisition
